name: Granularity Conditioning
short_description: Work that explicitly conditions an agent on its current operating granularity (global, subtask, atomic).
detailed_description: Tags assets and tasks that study the effect of telling the agent which level of the hierarchy it is currently operating at. Covers the three project conditions: scope-aware (A), scope-unaware (B), and scope-mismatched (C). Use this category for prompt designs, ablations, and analyses that turn the granularity label on or off.
